title: Honest small-sample flags
note: Signal scorecards now flag when a number rests on too few results to trust, so a tidy percentage built on a handful of calls can't pose as a proven finding.

title: Simplified this tracker
note: Replaced three overlapping scoring tables with one plain scorecard plus this change log. The detailed per-name history now lives in a collapsed drawer.

title: Deterministic bucket routing
note: Which bucket a stock lands in (consider / accumulate / watch / avoid) is now decided by a fixed rule, not the AI — no more contradictions between a signal and where it was filed.

title: Trading-day guard
note: Over holidays and weekends, stale sessions are labeled 'already reported' instead of being silently shown again as if fresh.

title: Fewer false alarms
note: Retired internal checks that were wrong 40-60% of the time. Quieter, more trustworthy logs.

title: Cleaner performance math
note: Fixed how each call's return is compared against its benchmark so the comparison is apples-to-apples (matched to the same session's close).
